reasoning: Severe packet loss on the downlink of the F1-c control plane interface, preventing effective signaling from the O-CU to the O-DU. This is prioritized over volumetric symptoms on F1-u and E2 because the failure of the control plane (F1-c) logically precedes and causes degradation in the user plane (F1-u) and the management plane (E2).
actionable_steps: 1. Inspect the network link and transport layer between the O-CU and O-DU to identify packet drops. 2. Verify the O-CU egress and O-DU ingress interface configurations and buffer health. 3. Check for any faulty network hardware (switches/routers) in the F1-c path.
